mapper.select: SELECT id, teacher_id, class_id, level_id, question_ids, title, due_at, created_at FROM assignments WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, teacher_id, class_id, level_id, question_ids, title, due_at, created_at FROM assignments WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assignments (teacher_id, class_id, level_id, question_ids, title, due_at, created_at) VALUES (#{teacherId}, #{classId}, #{levelId}, #{questionIds}, #{title}, #{dueAt}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE assignments SET class_id = #{classId}, level_id = #{levelId}, question_ids = #{questionIds}, title = #{title}, due_at = #{dueAt} WHERE id = #{id}
